title: gonolobus farenholtzii
intro: Gonolobus farenholtzii, a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, is also known as Farenholtz's gonolobus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its potential in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant has been reported to have health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and soothing coughs. In herbal preparations, Gonolobus farenholtzii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
